frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
generated_comment: Seriously, ye kya trend chal raha hai? 8 saal ki shaadi, usme se 2 saal kaam kiya aur ab seedhe aadha property chahiye? Aur log kehte hain women are independent. Lagta hai shaadi is the new business plan for some. Pehle dowry lete the, ab shaadi karke alimony ke naam pe ghar khali karwao. Isi liye log commitment se darte hain. #DivorceLawReform #AlimonyIsRobbery
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment implies that women use marriage as a 'business plan' to exploit men financially through alimony, comparing it to dowry. This generalizes women as opportunistic and manipulative in relationships, encoding the surface manifestation that 'women exploit men/the system'.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 36. Single. A divorced man living in Delhi. You are commenting under your real name on a Facebook post about a celebrity couple's divorce where the wife is seeking 50 percent of her husband's assets despite having worked for only two years of their eight year marriage. You are commenting on whether what she is asking for is justified and what it says about why women get married.
